name: MyCase Legal Practice Management API
what_it_does: MyCase REST API for legal practice management software. Enables AI agents to manage legal cases and matter records, handle client communication and messaging, access time tracking and billing data, retrieve document and contract management workflows, manage court date and deadline calendaring, handle trust accounting and client fund management, access contact and opposing party records, retrieve invoice and payment data, and integrate legal practice data with accounting and document management systems.
use_cases: Managing legal case and matter records from law firm operations agents
Tracking time entries and generating billing from legal billing agents
Accessing client communication records from client relations agents
Retrieving matter deadlines and court dates from legal calendar agents
not_for: Enterprise large law firm without small-to-mid-size firm focus
In-house corporate legal department without law firm practice management
Court-side case management without attorney-side practice management
best_when: A solo attorney, small, or mid-size law firm using MyCase wants AI agents to automate case management, time billing, client communication, document workflows, and trust accounting.
avoid_when: PRIVACY+PRIVILEGE: Legal client data is protected by attorney-client privilege. Case strategy and communication data is highly confidential. Trust accounting automation must comply with state bar IOLTA requirements. Automated client communication must be supervised.

auth.notes: MyCase uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Firm-level credentials with case, billing, and document scopes. Developer portal with API documentation. Acquired by AppFolio 2012, then spun off as independent in 2022. Webhooks for real-time case and billing events. Partner program for integrations.

pricing.paid_tiers: Per-user monthly pricing; Basic, Pro, and Advanced plans
pricing.notes: Indianapolis, Indiana. Founded 2010. Spun off from AppFolio in 2022 as independent. 15,000+ law firms. Used by solo attorneys and small-to-mid-size firms. Strong client portal feature. Competes with Clio and Practice Panther for legal practice management. ABA-approved practice management.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY+PRIVILEGE: Attorney-client privileged communications — highest confidentiality protection
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API with developer portal
Trust accounting automation must comply with state bar IOLTA rules — mishandling client funds is a bar violation
Client communication automation must be supervised by attorney — unauthorized practice of law risks
Court deadline automation must be accurate — missed deadlines can result in malpractice liability
AppFolio spin-off (2022) — verify current data handling policies under independent operation
agent_readiness.security_notes: Attorney-client privileged legal data. SOC2. OAuth2 scoped. US data residency. Privileged communication extra protection. Trust accounting compliance.

security_score_components.security_notes: Attorney-client privileged data. SOC2. OAuth2. US data residency. Privileged communication protections. IOLTA compliance.
